site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page showing how Super acts as a personal AI agent that actually operates MLS tools, CRMs, calendars, and email — reusing a computer-use cache so repeated listing launches, follow‑ups, and scheduling runs get faster and cheaper over time.
